236 G4DA G4DA_LEG_RANGE (G4DA) Leg Range of Motion CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: functional limitation in range of motion in last 7 days - leg - includig hip or knee - range of motion. 0 = No Limitation, 1 = Limitation on one side, 2 = Limitation on both sides, "-" = Unknown.
237 G4DB G4DB_LEG_MOVE (G4DB) Leg Voluntary Movement CHAR 1 Physical
